name: American Express Cobalt Card
welcome_bonus_description: Earn up to 30,000 Membership Rewards points: 5,000 MR points per month when you spend $500/month in months 1-3 (15,000 pts), plus 1,250 bonus MR points each month you spend $750 for 12 consecutive months (up to 15,000 additional pts).
rewards_summary: 5x MR points on eat and drink (restaurants, bars, cafes, food delivery, eligible grocery stores); 3x on eligible streaming subscriptions; 2x on travel, transit and gas; 1x on everything else. Points transferable to Aeroplan, British Airways Avios, Marriott Bonvoy, and other partners.
insurance_summary: Emergency out-of-province/country medical (15 days), rental car collision/damage waiver (up to $85,000), trip cancellation (up to $1,500/person), trip interruption (up to $1,500/person), flight delay (4+ hr, up to $500), baggage delay/loss, purchase protection (90 days), extended warranty (doubles up to 1 yr). No lounge access.

name: American Express Platinum Card
welcome_bonus_description: Earn up to 100,000 Membership Rewards points: 80,000 MR points after spending $10,000 in the first 3 months, plus 20,000 MR points after making a purchase in month 14.
rewards_summary: 3x MR points on eligible travel booked through Amex Travel Online; 2x on dining and food delivery in Canada; 1x on all other eligible purchases. Includes $200 annual travel credit, $200 annual dining credit, unlimited Priority Pass lounge visits (Prestige membership), and Centurion Lounge access.
insurance_summary: Emergency out-of-province/country medical (15 days under 65, 4 days 65+), rental car collision/damage waiver, trip cancellation, trip interruption, flight delay (4+ hr), baggage delay/loss, purchase protection (90 days), extended warranty (up to 1 yr). Priority Pass Prestige: unlimited lounge visits globally for cardholder + 1 guest.

name: American Express Gold Rewards Card

Points transferable to Aeroplan, British Airways Avios, Marriott Bonvoy, and other partners. Includes one complimentary supplementary card.
insurance_summary: Emergency out-of-province/country medical (15 days), rental car collision/damage waiver, purchase protection (90 days), extended warranty (up to 1 yr). No trip cancellation or interruption insurance. No lounge access.

name: American Express SimplyCash Card

insurance_summary: Purchase protection (90 days against theft and damage), extended warranty (doubles manufacturer up to 1 additional year). No travel insurance of any kind. No lounge access.

name: American Express SimplyCash Preferred Card
welcome_bonus_description: Earn 4% cashback on all eligible purchases for the first 6 months (up to $200 cashback), then 2% cashback on all eligible purchases permanently.

BONUSDOLLARS redeemable as statement credit. Best comprehensive travel insurance package in Canada. 4 complimentary DragonPass airport lounge visits per year.

Rental car collision/damage waiver, trip cancellation (up to $2,500/person), trip interruption (up to $5,000/person), flight delay (4+ hr, up to $500), baggage delay/loss, purchase protection (90 days), extended warranty (2 yrs). 4 complimentary DragonPass lounge visits/year.

name: Desjardins Visa Card (Entry-Level)
welcome_bonus_description: No welcome bonus. Earn BONUSDOLLARS cashback from your first eligible purchase. Available to Desjardins caisse members.
rewards_summary: Basic cashback equivalent of approximately 1% on eligible purchases via BONUSDOLLARS (1 BONUSDOLLAR per $100 spent = 1% return). BONUSDOLLARS redeemable as a statement credit. No annual fee. Available to Desjardins caisse members. Exact product name and earn structure may vary by caisse ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â consult desjardins.com for current offerings.
insurance_summary: Purchase protection (90 days), extended warranty (1 yr). No travel insurance. Best used as a no-fee everyday card for Desjardins caisse members.

name: MBNA Rewards World Elite Mastercard
welcome_bonus_description: Earn up to 30,000 MBNA Rewards points as a welcome bonus: 15,000 points after first eligible purchase, plus 15,000 points after spending $3,000 in the first 3 months. Annual fee waived in the first year.
rewards_summary: 5 MBNA Rewards points per $1 on eligible restaurant, grocery, digital media, and household utility purchases (combined, subject to annual spend cap); 1 MBNA Rewards point per $1 on all other eligible purchases. Points redeemable for travel, merchandise, cash back, and gift cards. 4 complimentary DragonPass airport lounge visits per year.
insurance_summary: Emergency out-of-country medical (21 days under 65), rental car collision/damage waiver, trip cancellation and interruption, flight delay, baggage delay/loss, purchase protection (90 days), extended warranty (1 yr). 4 complimentary DragonPass airport lounge visits per year.

name: MBNA True Line Mastercard
welcome_bonus_description: No welcome bonus. This is a low-interest credit card at a 12.99% purchase interest rate (versus the standard 19.99%). Designed for balance management, not rewards.
rewards_summary: No rewards program. This card offers a low purchase interest rate of 12.99% and a low cash advance rate. Ideal for Canadians who carry a balance monthly and want to minimize interest charges.
insurance_summary: Purchase protection (90 days), extended warranty (1 yr). Minimal insurance ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â no travel insurance included. Designed purely for interest cost management.

name: Brim World Elite Mastercard
welcome_bonus_description: Earn up to $200 in Brim Rewards as a welcome bonus when you meet spending thresholds in the first 3 months.
rewards_summary: 3% Brim Rewards on purchases at Brim partner merchants; 2% Brim Rewards on all other eligible purchases. NO foreign transaction fee. Unlimited airport lounge visits globally through DragonPass. $200 annual travel credit. A strong option for international travelers seeking no FX fees and lounge access.
insurance_summary: Emergency out-of-country medical (15 days), rental car collision/damage waiver, trip cancellation, trip interruption, flight delay, baggage delay/loss, purchase protection (90 days), extended warranty (1 yr). Unlimited airport lounge access globally through DragonPass.

name: Brim World Mastercard
welcome_bonus_description: Earn up to $25 in Brim Rewards as a welcome bonus.
rewards_summary: 1% Brim Rewards on all eligible purchases, up to 3% at select Brim partner merchants. NO foreign transaction fee ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â a rare feature for a no-fee card. Points redeemable as cashback or at Brim partner merchants at checkout. Ideal no-fee card for international shoppers and occasional travelers.
insurance_summary: Emergency out-of-country medical (10 days), purchase protection (90 days), extended warranty (1 yr). Basic travel insurance package. No lounge access at this tier.

name: Home Trust Preferred Visa Card
welcome_bonus_description: No formal welcome bonus. Earn 1% cashback on all eligible purchases from day one with no annual fee and no foreign transaction fee.
rewards_summary: 1% unlimited cashback on all eligible purchases. NO foreign transaction fee ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â the only no-fee Visa card in Canada with 0% FX fee. Ideal for international travel, online shopping in foreign currencies, and snowbirds spending in the US. Cashback paid annually as a statement credit.
insurance_summary: Purchase protection (90 days against damage and theft), extended warranty (doubles manufacturer warranty up to 1 yr). No travel insurance. The card's value is the combination of 0% FX fee + 1% cashback + no annual fee.

name: Neo Mastercard
welcome_bonus_description: Earn an average of 15% cashback at Neo partner merchants in your first 90 days as a new cardholder.
rewards_summary: Average 5% cashback at thousands of Neo partner merchants (local businesses and national brands across Canada); 0.5% cashback on all other eligible purchases. Cashback applied automatically to your balance. No annual fee. No minimum income requirement.
insurance_summary: Purchase protection (90 days). No travel insurance. This is a fintech cashback card ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â the value is in the partner merchant cashback network, not travel perks.

name: Capital One Costco Mastercard
welcome_bonus_description: No formal welcome bonus. Note: A paid Costco membership ($65-$135/yr) is required to apply and use this card. Cashback is earned from day one.
rewards_summary: 3% cashback at eligible restaurants worldwide; 2% cashback at eligible gas stations worldwide (including Costco gas); 1% cashback at Costco warehouses, Costco.ca, and all other eligible purchases. Costco membership required separately. Annual cashback paid as a Costco Shopping Card in February.
insurance_summary: Emergency out-of-province/country medical (15 days), purchase protection (90 days), extended warranty (1 yr). Basic travel insurance. No lounge access.

name: Simplii Financial Cash Back Visa Card
welcome_bonus_description: Earn 10% cashback at eligible restaurants, bars, and coffee shops for the first 3 months (up to $500 spend = maximum $50 extra cashback).
rewards_summary: 4% cashback on eligible restaurant, bar, and coffee shop purchases (up to $5,000/yr, then 0.5%); 1.5% cashback on eligible gas, grocery, and drugstore purchases plus pre-authorized bill payments; 0.5% cashback on all other eligible purchases. Annual cashback paid in January as a statement credit. No annual fee.
insurance_summary: Emergency out-of-country medical (8 days), purchase protection (90 days), extended warranty (1 yr). Basic travel medical coverage. No lounge access.

name: CIBC Select Visa Card
welcome_bonus_description: No rewards welcome bonus. This is a low-interest card with a 13.99% purchase interest rate. Balance transfer promotions may be offered periodically.
rewards_summary: No rewards program. The CIBC Select Visa offers a low purchase interest rate of 13.99% versus the standard 19.99%. Designed for CIBC clients who carry a monthly balance and want to minimize interest costs rather than earn rewards. No annual fee.

name: RBC Ion Visa Card
welcome_bonus_description: Earn up to 10,000 Avion Rewards points in your first year as a welcome bonus.
rewards_summary: 3 Avion Rewards points per $1 spent on groceries, streaming services, ride-sharing, digital subscriptions, and gaming; 1 Avion Rewards point per $1 on all other eligible purchases. No annual fee. Points redeemable for travel, gift cards, and statement credits. Good entry-level Avion card.
insurance_summary: Purchase protection (90 days against theft and damage), extended warranty (doubles manufacturer up to 1 additional year). No travel insurance.

name: ATB World Elite Mastercard

rewards_summary: 3 ATB Rewards points per $1 on eligible dining and entertainment purchases; 2 points per $1 on eligible grocery, gas, and transit purchases; 1 point per $1 on all other eligible purchases. Points redeemable for travel, merchandise, and statement credits. Available exclusively to Alberta residents.
insurance_summary: Emergency out-of-country medical (21 days under 65), rental car collision/damage waiver, trip cancellation and interruption, flight delay, baggage delay/loss, purchase protection (90 days), extended warranty (1 yr). 4 complimentary DragonPass airport lounge visits per year.

name: BMO eclipse rise Visa Infinite Card
welcome_bonus_description: Earn up to 25,000 BMO Rewards points as a welcome bonus: 20,000 points after spending $3,000 in the first 3 months, plus 5,000 bonus points after adding a first authorized user.
rewards_summary: 5 BMO Rewards points per $1 on eligible grocery, dining, gas, and pharmacy purchases; 1 BMO Rewards point per $1 on all other eligible purchases. No annual fee with Visa Infinite card benefits. Points redeemable for travel, merchandise, and gift cards. A no-fee card with strong accelerated earn on everyday categories.
insurance_summary: Emergency out-of-country medical (15 days), rental car collision/damage waiver, purchase protection (90 days), extended warranty (1 yr). Basic Visa Infinite travel insurance package. No trip cancellation. No lounge access.
